results.name: GEO Group
results.key_finding: Adelanto ICE trial April 2026 is the defining accountability event; floor-adjacent score unchanged. Flag for re-assessment after verdict.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: 200K+ displaced April 16 in a single day; state capacity collapsed. Monitor daily; if displacement > 400K, crosses threshold.

results.name: Character AI
results.key_finding: January 2026 Google settlement lifted ACC but exposed that pre-settlement EMP/SYS/INT scores were too generous given Garcia-case record.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: DOJ April 8 structural-antitrust challenge is new external accountability; internal practice unchanged. Watch April 21 earnings (first post-Hemsley return).

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: RSP rollback (I1/INT) + Pentagon litigation (BND) + IL SB 3261 targeting (ACC) collectively push Anthropic down a notch within Established band.

results.name: Ford Motor
results.key_finding: 1.4M F-150 recall already priced into 04-18 update; net delta now trivial.

results.name: Amazon
results.key_finding: PDX9 worker-death aftermath and layoff investigation consistent with published Critical score.

results.name: CoreCivic
results.key_finding: April 2026 SPLC-brokered forced-labor settlement lifts AB5 but other subdimensions drift down under 2026 evidence. Net stable at floor.

results.name: Meta Platforms
results.key_finding: $381M combined verdicts already priced into published index after 04-18 downgrade.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: NAACP v. xAI April 14 reconfirmed; entity at floor with no downside room.

results.name: Haiti
results.key_finding: Published composite 0 appears to be floor-clamping display artifact; raw subdimension averages support ~4.7. Methodology clarification, not substantive upgrade.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Same floor-clamping pattern as Haiti; UNMISS vote April 30 is the pivotal near-term event.

results.name: Chevron
results.key_finding: SCOTUS April 17 Plaquemines ruling shifts litigation venue but does not change internal practice. No score move.

results.name: Alphabet (Google)
results.key_finding: DOJ choice-screen remedy averted structural breakup. Assessed composite sits on Functional/Developing boundary (40.6 vs 41 threshold). Requires human review.

results.name: DeepSeek
results.key_finding: US regulatory pressure is external accountability; internal practice unchanged. Floor-adjacent; no band move.

high_priority_flags.reason: Delta -7.0; first post-settlement assessment reveals pre-2025 scores overstated EMP/SYS/INT
Delta -6.6; RSP rollback + Pentagon litigation + IL SB 3261 targeting
Functional/Developing band boundary — 40.6 sits just below 41 threshold; requires human review before apply

proposals_requiring_human_review: character-ai (first full assessment post-settlement; confidence medium)

watch_items_next_24h.reason: Displacement trajectory; > 400K would push new proposal

methodology_notes: Haiti and South Sudan published composites of 0.0 appear to be floor-clamping display artifacts. Research scores using raw subdimension means produce 4.7 and 3.8 respectively. Recommend methodology review before next index build.
Alphabet composite 40.6 vs 41 Functional threshold — band boundary requires explicit human confirmation even though delta is sub-threshold.
Sector alert: F500 DEI disclosures fell 65% in 2026 — affects EQU baseline across all Fortune 500 entities. Not yet priced into individual assessments.
